Dolce & Gabbana Kids

logo knitted sneakers

Dolce & Gabbana Kids' Sorrento sneakers are a small-sized iteration of the iconic pair. With knitted uppers and a practical slip-on style, these sneakers feature the same branding details as the original pair: a printed logo across the front, branded pull tab and branded heel counter.

Made in Italy

Highlights

The casual wear of Dolce & Gabbana Kids is second to none. Made from the highest quality fabrics in the image of the adult lines - your mini-mes will be in sartorial heaven with these black and white logo knitted sneakers. Chic from head to toe. Featuring a slip-on style, a pull tab at the rear, a printed logo, an open knit, a ridged rubber sole and a branded insole.
